PLAINTIFF JEFFREY MA, RYAN GIN, MICHAEL LUU's Motion To Compel Further Responses, To Compel Compliance, And To Impose Monetary Sanctions On Defendants Patrick Foy, Franklin Loffer, Np Sand And Sea Partners, Llc, Nphss, Llc, And North Point Ocean Partners, Llc.

Motion to Compel The initial Separate Statement was incomprehensible and the subsequent one does not enable the defendants to respond as it was served after the opposition was filed. Notwithstanding the foregoing, the only issue seems to be whether there are text messages that have not been produced by Foy and Loffer. (See Memo of P & A. p. 6 II). No sanctions are awarded to either side.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
